summary: Add, remove, or adjust stream delay while already live Discussion | Link
content: Streamers shouldn’t have to restart their stream just to change delay. InstantDelay lets OBS & Streamlabs streamers: Add, Remove, or Adjust stream delay while already live. Built for competitive streamers, tournaments, subathons, and multi-streaming, with Instant Mode, Overlay Mode, custom overlays, hotkeys, and Stream Deck support.
chineseSummary: 在直播时添加、删除或调整流延迟 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: 直播者不应该仅仅为了改变延迟而重新启动直播。 InstantDelay 允许 OBS 和 Streamlabs 直播者：在直播时添加、删除或调整直播延迟。专为竞技直播、锦标赛、亚马拉松和多直播而打造，具有即时模式、覆盖模式、自定义覆盖、热键和 Stream Deck 支持。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
